description: Magic that reshapes reality: transforming bodies, transmuting matter, reversing time's work on objects, and bending physical form.
abilities: Feign Death
Death is easy to fake when you know how still to lie. Cold skin, no pulse, and only the faintest awareness that the world hasn't stopped.
Genesis Command
Time flows both ways through a single touch. An elder returned to youth, a child aged to maturity. The body transforms, but the memories remain.
Loosen
A twirl of the finger and everything fastened comes undone. Bags unclasp, laces untie, belts unbuckle, and leashed animals break free. Pure mischief.
Petrify
Stone creeps across living skin like frost on a window. The trapped can't move, can't speak. Just wait inside their shell and hope someone breaks it gently.
Pinch
Supernatural strength in the fingertips. Enough to pinch a bully's collar and hoist them skyward, or casually slide an anvil across the floor.
Reshape
A face is just clay to the right hands. A touch sculpts new features: older, younger, someone else entirely. The change is permanent, and not easily undone.
Steelsprout
Steel dissolves into living green as metal becomes plant. The caster chooses every stem and leaf that emerges. Permanent and irreversible.
Strech
Size is a suggestion. A creature or object can be doubled or halved in an instant, weight shifting to match as the world adjusts around it.
The Bitter Gift
A spoken meditation that awakens a mindless creature to language, identity, and self. A profound gift, haunted by the dim memory of what it was before it could think.
To Dust
Everything crafted eventually returns to nothing. This just skips the waiting, reducing an object to fine dust on the breeze. Permanent and irreversible.
Undo
A word of power that unravels craftsmanship itself. Shoes unlace, garments unthread, furniture collapses into lumber. Nothing made is safe.
